mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payroll_info ( employee_id, pay_month, base_pay, allowance, bonus, deduction, social_insurance, tax, net_pay, pay_date, created_at ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{payMonth}, #{basePay}, #{allowance}, #{bonus}, #{deduction}, #{socialInsurance}, #{tax}, #{netPay}, #{payDate}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE payroll_info SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, pay_month = #{payMonth}, base_pay = #{basePay}, allowance = #{allowance}, bonus = #{bonus}, deduction = #{deduction}, social_insurance = #{socialInsurance}, tax = #{tax}, net_pay = #{netPay}, pay_date = #{payDate} WHERE payroll_id = #{payrollId}
mapper.select: SELECT payroll_id, employee_id, pay_month, base_pay, allowance, bonus, deduction, social_insurance, tax, net_pay, pay_date, created_at FROM payroll_info WHERE payroll_id = #{payrollId}

SELECT p.payroll_id, p.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, p.pay_month, p.base_pay, p.allowance, p.bonus, p.deduction, p.social_insurance, p.tax, p.net_pay, p.pay_date, p.created_at FROM payroll_info p LEFT JOIN employee_info e ON p.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE p.payroll_id = #{payrollId}
